author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Plan: The bucketing from CL-370 processes buckets sequentially AFTER backward completes. The overlap optimization registers autograd hooks on parameters so that when a bucket's last gradient arrives, its allreduce starts immediately — while backward continues computing gradients for earlier layers.

Approach: Add a DDP method that registers post-accumulate-grad hooks on each parameter. When a parameter's gradient is ready, mark its bucket. When all params in a bucket have grads, spawn the allreduce for that bucket in a background thread. sync_gradients then just waits for all pending allreduces to complete.

This requires: (1) tracking which params have received grads, (2) per-bucket ready counters, (3) background allreduce via thread pool.
